title: Spin 15 claude-persona agents to prepare a16z Speedrun application pitch
description:
Next-session work. Rismay's 2026-05-17 directive: 'we will apply to a16z speedrun. divulge as much as we need. understand that we are working with the enemy. we need to play chess, not checkers, and basically make sure not to be taken down like the CISCO founder.' Per substrate doctrine vc-engagement-as-strategic-adversarial-game-cisco-warning (committed at 89a0b137f8): substrate's stance is strategic adversarial engagement with calibrated disclosure + founder-protection-from-application-stage + substrate-identity-preservation as deal-breaker. 

Fanout structure: spin 15 sub-agents in parallel via the substrate's agent ecosystem. Each agent owns one sub-task; closure of this parent bead depends on closure of all 15. 

The 15 sub-tasks:
1. a16z-speedrun-application-narrative — Draft the application's main narrative. Lead with substrate identity (mass-deployable scientific method as consumer-app primitive), three-anchor convergence (anime+test-harness+economics), 80+ committed typed records as proof-of-discipline. Cross-link to vaults/wrkstrm-doctrine/ for substrate's typed positions.
2. a16z-speedrun-technical-demo-plan — Identify which substrate apps + flows to show. Candidates: hackernews.mac.app (substrate-scaffolded reader; Trigun-tier dogfood), foundry app with FleetView, source-control-by-wrkstrm. Each demo must be Apple-app-store-installable in <60 sec to land impact.
3. research-speedrun-program-details-2026 — Fetch current Speedrun program structure: cohort size, batch cadence, check size, equity terms, Demo Day format, recent graduates. Sources: a16z.com/speedrun, Crunchbase, recent press. Update vaults/venture-capital/firms/speedrun.json with primary-source verified facts (supersedes interim training-memory record).
4. research-a16z-gaming-partners-2026 — Identify which a16z partners read Speedrun applications + their public investment theses + recent portfolio. Personalize the pitch to whichever partner is most aligned. Sources: a16z partner bios, recent investments, Twitter/X presence, podcast appearances.
5. a16z-speedrun-founder-bio-disclosure-strategy — Calibrate which biographical anchors to reveal in application. Anime/manga + Bucknell economics + Nash identification are substrate-aligned humanizing details that won't leak strategic position. Test-harness-engineering professional background CAN be revealed (it's the substrate's rigor source). Do NOT reveal specific employer/company names if they identify rismay's day-job.
6. a16z-speedrun-demo-assets — Produce screenshot pack + 60-90 second demo video. Hero shots: substrate-typed-ontology rendered as native Mac app (not text-dump UI), the cross-vault LinkRef graph visualized, the supersession chain animation. Apple graphics stack (SceneKit / SwiftUI 3D rotation) renders the Hilbert-space-enthrall doctrine literally.
7. a16z-speedrun-business-model-unit-economics — Draft revenue model: per-app App Store revenue × ship-10-apps/day target × take-rate model. Compare unit economics to closed-system competitors (Cursor seat-based, Replit subscription, Apple AI in-app). Substrate's advantage: each substrate-generated app is a separate App Store SKU with its own revenue, not a single product.
8. research-competitive-landscape-2026 — Map competitor positioning vs substrate. Direct competitors: Cursor (AI-IDE), Replit (AI-platform), Vercel v0 (AI-scaffold). Adjacent: Apple FoundationModels, Anthropic Claude Code, OpenAI Codex. Where substrate's typed-ontology + test-harness-as-database differentiates: pull primary sources from each competitor's docs.
9. a16z-speedrun-moat-claim — Articulate the moat in a16z-legible terms. Lead: substrate externalizes Google's productivity engine (Piper + Bazel + TAP + Critique) onto consumer-app primitives. Quantizes Google's organizational Hilbert space (SWE/SRE/TL/EM/Fellow ladder) into LLM-driven agent ecosystem at workstation scale. Cite committed Concepts at vaults/wrkstrm-doctrine/concepts/substrate-externalizes-* + substrate-quantizes-*.
10. a16z-speedrun-team-plan — Honest team narrative. rismay + substrate-quantized claude personas (claude/carrie/castor/pollux/claw/caretaker/mono/digikoma-personas). Frame substrate as one-operator-with-agent-ecosystem productivity model. Anticipate a16z's 'where's the team?' question — answer: the substrate IS the team-quantization; no carbon-team needed for substrate's per-operator scale; team-expansion happens via more substrate apps shipped, not more headcount.
11. research-term-sheet-founder-protections-2026 — Compile current best-practice founder-protection terms from 2024-2026 a16z portfolio company term sheets (where publicly disclosed). Dual-class stock, board composition, founder-CEO retention clauses, ratchet-down protections, super-voting if available. Output: term-sheet ask document for negotiation prep.
12. a16z-speedrun-cisco-warning-risk-assessment — Apply the Cisco-founder lesson (Bosack+Lerner ousted by Sequoia+Morgridge 1990) to a16z Speedrun specifically. Identify the multi-move sequence (term sheet → board seat → professional-CEO insertion → founder-ouster) at Speedrun's accelerator stage. Identify which protections must be hard-deal-breakers vs negotiable. Substrate-identity-preservation is non-negotiable per substrate doctrine.
13. a16z-speedrun-product-roadmap-6-months — Draft what substrate ships in the next 6 months IF accepted into Speedrun cohort. Concrete deliverables tied to substrate-doctrine: implement 6-mechanic engagement catalog in hackernews.mac.app, ship 3+ more scaffolded apps, materialize TimelineMoment records, author investor-schemas family + ordinality tables, build paste-cache extraction CLI, build typed-citation-quality scoring CLI.
14. a16z-speedrun-traction-numbers — Compile substrate traction metrics. hack-nu App Store downloads (build 984 shipped 2026-05-01), GitHub repo stars/forks (wrkstrm-* repos), TAP-equivalent test pass rate (LDT proof count), substrate doctrine vault sizes (Concepts/Hypotheses/Explorations committed), commit cadence (commits-per-day from substrate's git log). Honest numbers; substrate is honest-uncertainty + honest-traction per bastards-for-peace-and-love.
15. a16z-speedrun-why-now-framing — Articulate substrate's 'why now' for a16z investment. Pre-AI in concept (test-harness engineering + scientific method + Curry-Howard pre-date LLMs by decades) BUT post-2024 in deployment timing (consumer-app distribution + mass smartphone compute + cultural readiness for typed-everything just matured). AI is accelerant not foundation. The window is now: substrate's competitive advantage erodes once others externalize their own versions of Google's productivity engine.

Closure criteria: 15 sub-task agents have produced their respective deliverables; rismay reviews the assembled application; application submitted to Speedrun. Substrate doctrine binds the strategic approach (vc-engagement-as-strategic-adversarial-game-cisco-warning). Operator decision required on FINAL disclosure calibration before submission — substrate sub-agents draft; rismay edits + ships.
